description: Analyze ledger postings to find cost changes, then create projects/activities
endpoints: GET /ledger/posting — params: dateFrom, dateTo, accountNumberFrom, accountNumberTo, count
common_errors: Must include dateFrom and dateTo on /ledger/posting queries
Circuit breaker triggers at 10 errors — be precise with API calls
tips: EFFICIENT APPROACH: 1) GET /ledger/posting?dateFrom=2026-01-01&dateTo=2026-01-31&accountNumberFrom=4000&accountNumberTo=9999&count=1000 for January expenses. 2) Same for February (dateFrom=2026-02-01&dateTo=2026-02-28). 3) In your analysis, sum amountGross by account number for each month. 4) Find the 3 accounts with largest increase (Feb - Jan). 5) For each, use create_project with isInternal=true and name=account name. 6) For project-specific activities, use generic_api_call POST /project/projectActivity with body {"project": {"id": PROJECT_ID}, "activity": {"name": "activity name", "activityType": "PROJECT_SPECIFIC_ACTIVITY"}}. For general activities, use POST /activity with {"name": "name", "activityType": "GENERAL_ACTIVITY"}. Do ALL ledger reads with generic_api_call. Do NOT retry failed calls — adjust parameters instead.
